requirement_topic.en: NRTL Safety Listing (UL 61730) + NEC Article 690 AHJ Permit
requirement_topic.zh: NRTL安全上市认证（UL 61730）及NEC第690条地方执法机构许可
requirement_topic.zht: NRTL安全上市認證（UL 61730）及NEC第690條地方執法機構許可

summary.en: US market access for installed PV modules is controlled by legal and code obligations: OSHA's NRTL framework (29 CFR 1910.7) for covered workplaces, NEC Article 690 as adopted by state/local law, AHJ permitting, and utility Permission to Operate (PTO). UL 61730 (Photovoltaic (PV) Module Safety Qualification — the US adoption of IEC 61730) is a voluntary consensus safety standard commonly used by OSHA-recognised NRTLs to evaluate and list PV modules; it is not itself the mandatory law. AHJs normally require a listed module before issuing building/electrical permits, and NRTL listings may reference UL 61730 or an equivalent accepted standard and edition. Current active editions include UL 61730-1 Ed. 3 (March 2026, adopting IEC 61730-1:2023) and UL 61730-2 Ed. 3 (March 2026, adopting IEC 61730-2:2023). Confirm the edition and acceptance basis with the selected NRTL and the project AHJ before submission.
summary.zh: 美国已安装光伏组件的市场准入由法律和规范义务控制：适用于受覆盖工作场所的OSHA NRTL框架（29 CFR 1910.7）、经州/地方法律采纳的NEC第690条、AHJ许可，以及电力公司的运行许可（PTO）。UL 61730（光伏组件安全资格认证——IEC 61730的美国采用版本）是OSHA认可NRTL常用于评估并列名光伏组件的自愿共识安全标准；该标准本身并不是强制法律。AHJ通常会在签发建筑/电气许可前要求组件已获列名，NRTL列名可引用UL 61730或其他被接受的等效标准及版本。现行有效版本包括UL 61730-1第3版（2026年3月，采用IEC 61730-1:2023）及UL 61730-2第3版（2026年3月，采用IEC 61730-2:2023）。提交前应向所选NRTL及项目AHJ确认适用版本和接受依据。
summary.zht: 美國已安裝光伏組件的市場准入由法律和規範義務控制：適用於受覆蓋工作場所的OSHA NRTL框架（29 CFR 1910.7）、經州/地方法律採納的NEC第690條、AHJ許可，以及電力公司的運行許可（PTO）。UL 61730（光伏組件安全資格認證——IEC 61730的美國採用版本）是OSHA認可NRTL常用於評估並列名光伏組件的自願共識安全標準；該標準本身並不是強制法律。AHJ通常會在簽發建築/電氣許可前要求組件已獲列名，NRTL列名可引用UL 61730或其他被接受的等效標準及版本。現行有效版本包括UL 61730-1第3版（2026年3月，採用IEC 61730-1:2023）及UL 61730-2第3版（2026年3月，採用IEC 61730-2:2023）。提交前應向所選NRTL及項目AHJ確認適用版本和接受依據。

standards_or_laws: Local AHJ building / electrical codes (varies by jurisdiction)

summary.en: China may require PV modules used in regulated grid-connected projects to complete project/procurement acceptance through CQC or other certification routes and to satisfy current NEA/MIIT catalogue or listing rules where applicable. GB/T 9535 (crystalline silicon) and GB/T 18911 (thin-film, which covers perovskite modules) are technical standard bases used in those processes; the legal/procurement obligation is the applicable Chinese project approval, certification or catalogue rule, not the GB/T standard by itself. These Chinese certifications and test reports are not recognised by US NRTLs. As of June 2026, no specific perovskite module category has been confirmed in the published MIIT PV product compliance catalogue; perovskite modules entering commercial-scale grid-connected projects in China should verify current NEA/MIIT listing requirements directly with the certifying body, as policy evolves with Chinese GW-scale perovskite production ramp-up.
summary.zh: 中国受监管并网项目使用的光伏组件，可能需要通过CQC或其他认证路径完成项目/采购准入，并在适用时满足现行国家能源局/工信部目录或列名规则。GB/T 9535（晶硅）和GB/T 18911（薄膜，涵盖钙钛矿组件）是这些流程中使用的技术标准依据；具有约束力的是适用的中国项目审批、认证或目录规则，而非GB/T标准本身。上述中国认证及测试报告不被美国NRTL认可。截至2026年6月，已发布的工信部光伏产品合规目录中尚未确认设有钙钛矿组件专项类别；拟在中国参与商业规模并网项目的钙钛矿组件，应直接向认证机构核实当前国家能源局/工信部的目录申报要求，相关政策将随中国钙钛矿吉瓦级产能释放持续演进。
summary.zht: 中國受監管併網項目使用的光伏組件，可能需要通過CQC或其他認證路徑完成項目/採購准入，並在適用時符合現行國家能源局/工信部目錄或列名規則。GB/T 9535（晶矽）和GB/T 18911（薄膜，涵蓋鈣鈦礦組件）是這些流程中使用的技術標準依據；具有約束力的是適用的中國項目審批、認證或目錄規則，而非GB/T標準本身。上述中國認證及測試報告不被美國NRTL認可。截至2026年6月，已發布的工信部光伏產品合規目錄中尚未確認設有鈣鈦礦組件專項類別；擬在中國參與商業規模併網項目的鈣鈦礦組件，應直接向認證機構核實當前國家能源局/工信部的目錄申報要求，相關政策將隨中國鈣鈦礦吉瓦級產能釋放持續演進。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9535-1998 (crystalline silicon PV modules, for reference)
CQC or other certification route for regulated grid-connected PV projects, where required by project/procurement rules
MIIT photovoltaic product compliance catalogue (工信部光伏产品合规目录)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T and CQC test reports carry zero mutual recognition with US NRTLs. For US installations, the legal/code gap is that AHJs and workplace safety authorities generally expect equipment accepted through an OSHA-recognised NRTL listing, commonly evaluated to UL 61730 or another accepted safety standard, before permits and energisation proceed. Additional perovskite-specific durability considerations (moisture, thermal stability, lead content handling) may require supplemental NRTL review beyond the baseline UL 61730 scope; confirm with the NRTL. AHJ permit must also be obtained per installation with no CN process substitute. No publicly available UL or OSHA formal guidance on a perovskite-specific NRTL certification pathway has been identified as of June 2026; NRTLs are handling perovskite modules on a case-by-case engineering basis. TÜV SÜD has published a proprietary specification (PPP 58229:2024) for perovskite module design qualification, but this is not itself a US NRTL listing pathway.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T与CQC测试报告与美国NRTL之间不存在互认。对于美国安装项目，法律/规范层面的差距在于，AHJ及工作场所安全主管机关通常要求设备通过OSHA认可NRTL列名（通常按UL 61730或其他被接受的安全标准评估）后，才会推进许可和通电。钙钛矿特有的耐久性考量（湿热、热稳定性、铅含量处理）可能需要NRTL在UL 61730基准范围之外进行补充审查；请向NRTL确认。AHJ许可亦须逐项目申请，且无法以任何中国流程替代。截至2026年6月，尚未发现UL或OSHA就钙钛矿组件NRTL认证路径发布的公开正式指导文件；NRTL目前按逐案工程判断处理钙钛矿组件。TÜV SÜD已发布专有规范（PPP 58229:2024）用于钙钛矿组件设计鉴定，但该规范本身不构成美国NRTL上市认证路径。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T與CQC測試報告與美國NRTL之間不存在互認。對於美國安裝項目，法律/規範層面的差距在於，AHJ及工作場所安全主管機關通常要求設備通過OSHA認可NRTL列名（通常按UL 61730或其他被接受的安全標準評估）後，才會推進許可和通電。鈣鈦礦特有的耐久性考量（濕熱、熱穩定性、鉛含量處理）可能需要NRTL在UL 61730基準範圍之外進行補充審查；請向NRTL確認。AHJ許可亦須逐項目申請，且無法以任何中國流程替代。截至2026年6月，尚未發現UL或OSHA就鈣鈦礦組件NRTL認證路徑發布的公開正式指導文件；NRTL目前按逐案工程判斷處理鈣鈦礦組件。TÜV SÜD已發布專有規範（PPP 58229:2024）用於鈣鈦礦組件設計鑒定，但該規範本身不構成美國NRTL上市認證路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal/code obligation: comply with applicable OSHA/NRTL acceptance rules, NEC Article 690 as adopted locally, AHJ permitting, and utility PTO. UL 61730 is a voluntary consensus standard commonly used for NRTL listing and presumption/acceptance, not the legal mandate itself.
mandatory_status.cn: Project/procurement certification or catalogue listing may be required where applicable; GB/T standards are technical bases and are not mandatory legal obligations by themselves

source.publisher: U.S. Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only — not legal advice. Chinese perovskite PV modules with only GB/T 18911 / CQC documentation will not satisfy US AHJ/NRTL acceptance expectations for installed projects. The US legal path is to obtain an OSHA-recognised NRTL listing, commonly evaluated to UL 61730 or an accepted equivalent standard, then secure AHJ permit approval and utility PTO for each installation site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考，不构成法律建议。仅持有GB/T 18911 / CQC文件的中国钙钛矿光伏组件，通常不能满足美国安装项目的AHJ/NRTL接受要求。美国法律路径是取得OSHA认可NRTL列名（通常按UL 61730或被接受的等效标准评估），随后逐安装现场取得AHJ许可批准和电力公司PTO。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考，不構成法律建議。僅持有GB/T 18911 / CQC文件的中國鈣鈦礦光伏組件，通常不能符合美國安裝項目的AHJ/NRTL接受要求。美國法律路徑是取得OSHA認可NRTL列名（通常按UL 61730或被接受的等效標準評估），隨後逐安裝現場取得AHJ許可批准和電力公司PTO。

requirement_topic.en: UFLPA Customs Scrutiny + IRA Domestic-Content Incentive Disadvantage
requirement_topic.zh: 《维吾尔强迫劳动预防法》海关审查及《通胀削减法》国内含量激励劣势
requirement_topic.zht: 《維吾爾強迫勞動預防法》海關審查及《通脹削減法》國內含量激勵劣勢

summary.en: Two distinct US trade and incentive barriers apply to Chinese-origin solar products. (1) UFLPA (Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act, Pub. L. 117-78, effective 21 Jun 2022): US Customs and Border Protection (CBP) applies a rebuttable presumption that goods mined, produced, or manufactured wholly or in part in the Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region — or by entities on the UFLPA Entity List — are made with forced labour and are prohibited from import under 19 U.S.C. 1307. Solar supply chains (polysilicon, wafer, cell, module) are a primary enforcement focus; importers bear the burden of proof to rebut the presumption with clear and convincing evidence of supply-chain traceability. (2) IRA Domestic Content: The Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 (Pub. L. 117-169) provides Investment Tax Credit (ITC) adders (up to 10 percentage points under IRC 48(a)(12)) for PV projects meeting domestic-content requirements for manufactured products and structural steel/iron. Modules manufactured in China do not qualify for these adders, creating a pricing disadvantage versus US- or USMCA-manufactured modules on projects where ITC adders are claimed. ITC domestic-content adder structure confirmed: 2 percentage points base adder; up to 10 percentage points if prevailing-wage and apprenticeship requirements are also met (IRC 48(a)(12)). IRS/Treasury final regulations issued December 2024 (TD 10015, effective December 12, 2024); elective safe harbour updated by Notice 2025-8. Verify current rules with a qualified US tax advisor as further guidance may be issued.
summary.zh: 两项不同的美国贸易和激励政策壁垒适用于中国产太阳能产品。（1）《维吾尔强迫劳动预防法》（UFLPA，Pub. L. 117-78，2022年6月21日生效）：美国海关与边境保护局（CBP）对在新疆维吾尔自治区全部或部分开采、生产或制造的商品，或由UFLPA实体名单上的主体生产的商品，适用可反驳推定原则，认定其为强迫劳动产品，并依据19 U.S.C. 1307禁止进口。太阳能供应链（多晶硅、硅片、电池、组件）是主要执法重点；进口商须承担举证责任，以清晰且令人信服的供应链溯源证据推翻该推定。（2）《通胀削减法》国内含量要求：2022年《通胀削减法》（Pub. L. 117-169）对满足制成品及结构钢铁国内含量要求的光伏项目提供投资税收抵免（ITC）加成（按IRC 48(a)(12)最高可达10个百分点）。在中国制造的组件不符合上述加成资格，与在项目中申请ITC加成的美国或USMCA制造组件相比存在定价劣势。ITC国内含量加成结构已确认：基础加成2个百分点；同时满足现行工资及学徒制要求可达10个百分点（IRC 48(a)(12)）。财政部/国税局已于2024年12月发布最终法规（TD 10015，2024年12月12日生效）；2025-8号通知更新了选择性安全港规则。具体适用情况请向有资质的美国税务顾问确认。
summary.zht: 兩項不同的美國貿易和激勵政策壁壘適用於中國產太陽能產品。（1）《維吾爾強迫勞動預防法》（UFLPA，Pub. L. 117-78，2022年6月21日生效）：美國海關與邊境保護局（CBP）對在新疆維吾爾自治區全部或部分開採、生產或製造的商品，或由UFLPA實體名單上的主體生產的商品，適用可反駁推定原則，認定其為強迫勞動產品，並依據19 U.S.C. 1307禁止進口。太陽能供應鏈（多晶硅、硅片、電池、組件）是主要執法重點；進口商須承擔舉證責任，以清晰且令人信服的供應鏈溯源證據推翻該推定。（2）《通脹削減法》國內含量要求：2022年《通脹削減法》（Pub. L. 117-169）對滿足製成品及結構鋼鐵國內含量要求的光伏項目提供投資稅收抵免（ITC）加成（按IRC 48(a)(12)最高可達10個百分點）。在中國製造的組件不符合上述加成資格，與在項目中申請ITC加成的美國或USMCA製造組件相比存在定價劣勢。ITC國內含量加成結構已確認：基礎加成2個百分點；同時滿足現行工資及學徒制要求可達10個百分點（IRC 48(a)(12)）。財政部/國稅局已於2024年12月發布最終法規（TD 10015，2024年12月12日生效）；2025-8號通知更新了選擇性安全港規則。具體適用情況請向有資質的美國稅務顧問確認。

standards_or_laws: Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act (UFLPA), Pub. L. 117-78 (2021)
19 U.S.C. 1307 (prohibition on importation of goods made with forced labour)
Inflation Reduction Act of 2022, Pub. L. 117-169
IRS / Treasury Notice 2023-29 and subsequent guidance on domestic-content requirements

summary.en: China has no equivalent trade restriction targeting foreign-origin goods on forced-labour grounds for import purposes. China's domestic solar incentive programmes (e.g., feed-in tariff subsidies, NEA auction allocations) favour domestically manufactured equipment but through administrative preference rather than a tax-credit adder mechanism. There is no CN-side mirror of the UFLPA rebuttable presumption or the IRA domestic-content ITC structure.
summary.zh: 中国没有以强迫劳动为由对外国产品进口实施类似贸易限制的对等制度。中国国内太阳能激励计划（如上网电价补贴、国家能源局竞价配额）通过行政优先而非税收抵免加成机制倾向于国内制造设备。中国方面没有对应UFLPA可反驳推定或《通胀削减法》国内含量ITC结构的镜像制度。
summary.zht: 中國沒有以強迫勞動為由對外國產品進口實施類似貿易限制的對等制度。中國國內太陽能激勵計劃（如上網電價補貼、國家能源局競價配額）通過行政優先而非稅收抵免加成機制傾向於國內製造設備。中國方面沒有對應UFLPA可反駁推定或《通脹削減法》國內含量ITC結構的鏡像制度。

standards_or_laws: NEA solar auction allocation rules (administrative preference only)
MIIT photovoltaic product compliance catalogue (domestic preference, not a trade ban)

gap.en: UFLPA gap: Chinese perovskite module exporters must maintain comprehensive supply-chain traceability documentation (polysilicon origin, wafer, cell, module processing records) sufficient to rebut the CBP forced-labour presumption. Failure to produce this evidence results in detention or exclusion at US customs. This is a documentary and audit burden with no CN equivalent. IRA domestic-content gap: Modules manufactured in China are ineligible for the ITC domestic-content adder, meaning US project developers may prefer non-Chinese modules to maximise tax credits, putting Chinese manufacturers at a competitive disadvantage on ITC-claiming projects. Note: CBP UFLPA enforcement covers all solar supply-chain inputs including polysilicon; perovskite modules not incorporating silicon wafers may have a narrower traceability scope, but lead-halide perovskite precursors (e.g., lead iodide, methylammonium iodide) sourced from China are still subject to UFLPA scrutiny if any processing occurred in Xinjiang. Verify the specific traceability scope for your module bill of materials with US trade counsel.
gap.zh: UFLPA差距：中国钙钛矿组件出口商必须维护完整的供应链溯源文件（多晶硅产地、硅片、电池及组件加工记录），以满足推翻CBP强迫劳动推定所需的充分证明标准。未能提供上述证据将导致货物在美国海关被扣押或拒绝入境。这是一项无中国对应机制的文件及审计负担。《通胀削减法》国内含量差距：在中国制造的组件不符合ITC国内含量加成资格，意味着美国项目开发商为最大化税收抵免可能优先选用非中国组件，使中国制造商在申请ITC加成的项目中处于竞争劣势。注：CBP UFLPA执法涵盖所有太阳能供应链投入品（包括多晶硅）；不含硅片的钙钛矿组件溯源范围可能较窄，但若铅卤化物钙钛矿前驱体（如碘化铅、碘甲铵）在新疆经历任何加工环节，仍须遵守UFLPA。具体组件物料清单的溯源范围请向美国贸易律师确认。
gap.zht: UFLPA差距：中國鈣鈦礦組件出口商必須維護完整的供應鏈溯源文件（多晶硅產地、硅片、電池及組件加工記錄），以滿足推翻CBP強迫勞動推定所需的充分證明標準。未能提供上述證據將導致貨物在美國海關被扣押或拒絕入境。這是一項無中國對應機制的文件及審計負擔。《通脹削減法》國內含量差距：在中國製造的組件不符合ITC國內含量加成資格，意味著美國項目開發商為最大化稅收抵免可能優先選用非中國組件，使中國製造商在申請ITC加成的項目中處於競爭劣勢。注：CBP UFLPA執法涵蓋所有太陽能供應鏈投入品（包括多晶硅）；不含硅片的鈣鈦礦組件溯源範圍可能較窄，但若鉛鹵化物鈣鈦礦前驅體（如碘化鉛、碘甲銨）在新疆經歷任何加工環節，仍須遵守UFLPA。具體組件物料清單的溯源範圍請向美國貿易律師確認。

mandatory_status.target: UFLPA customs enforcement is mandatory where the rebuttable presumption applies under 19 U.S.C. 1307. IRA domestic-content adders are voluntary tax incentives; they may be commercially important on ITC projects but are not mandatory market-access requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only — not legal advice. Chinese perovskite module exporters face two compounding US market-access barriers beyond product certification: (1) UFLPA rebuttable presumption requiring robust supply-chain traceability documentation at US customs or risk detention/exclusion; and (2) IRA domestic-content rules that exclude Chinese-made modules from ITC adders, creating a structural pricing disadvantage on US projects where those adders are claimed. Consult qualified US trade and tax counsel for project-specific advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考，不构成法律建议。中国钙钛矿组件出口商在产品认证之外，还面临两项叠加的美国市场准入壁垒：（1）《维吾尔强迫劳动预防法》可反驳推定，要求在美国海关提供完整供应链溯源文件，否则面临扣押/拒绝入境风险；（2）《通胀削减法》国内含量规则将中国制造组件排除在ITC加成资格之外，在申请此类加成的美国项目中形成结构性定价劣势。项目具体事宜请咨询有资质的美国贸易及税务律师。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考，不構成法律建議。中國鈣鈦礦組件出口商在產品認證之外，還面臨兩項疊加的美國市場準入壁壘：（1）《維吾爾強迫勞動預防法》可反駁推定，要求在美國海關提供完整供應鏈溯源文件，否則面臨扣押/拒絕入境風險；（2）《通脹削減法》國內含量規則將中國製造組件排除在ITC加成資格之外，在申請此類加成的美國項目中形成結構性定價劣勢。項目具體事宜請咨詢有資質的美國貿易及稅務律師。
